sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40729" key="e)pirrhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιρρητέον</orth>, <sense id="n40729.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must say concerning</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῷ τοῦ Αἰσχύλου . . ὅτι . . </quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.36b</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
